  "experiment_overview": "The experiment involves the isolation and culture of canine aortic endothelial cells (CnAOECs) from canine aortas. The goal is to study the expression of CD31, a marker of endothelial cells, in different vascular locations (vena cava, vena porta, and aorta) from multiple dogs.",
